She was hired to coordinate the logistics for the upcoming conference.

day 4.meaning: điều phối viên, người phụ trác
day 4.example: Contact the event coordinator if you have any questions.
The project requires close coordination between several departments.

day 4.meaning: hiếm khi, khó khăn, hầu như không
day 4.example: I could hardly hear the speaker because of the background noise.
He hardly ever takes a day off from work.
It is hard to find reliable employees nowadays.
The artist is famous for her abstract paintings.
You can find his phone number in the company directory.

day 4.meaning: chịu trách nhiệm, có thể giải thích đượ
day 4.example: Managers must be accountable for the performance of their teams.
The new policy aims to increase transparency and accountability.
The CEO is ultimately accountable for the company's financial results.

day 4.meaning: bắt A chịu trách nhiệm về
day 4.example: Citizens should hold their government accountable for its promises.
The project manager is directly accountable to the board of directors.
She skillfully navigated the complex negotiations to reach a deal.
He is a skillful negotiator who always gets the best price.
The magazine secured an exclusive interview with the famous actor.

day 4.meaning: ý định, mục đích, ý muốn (đếm đượ
day 4.example: I have no intention of quitting my job at this time.

day 4.meaning: ý định, mục đích (không đếm được
day 4.example: He entered the building with the intent to steal.
We intend to launch the new product in the Asian market first.
The students listened intently to the guest lecturer.
I have every intention of finishing this project by tomorrow.
The renovation will completely transform the old office space.
The company underwent a major digital transformation last year.

day 4.meaning: tôn trọng, lễ phép, kính cẩ
day 4.example: Please maintain a respectful tone when communicating with clients.
We deeply respect his contribution to the industry.
He respectfully declined the offer to join the competitor's firm.
She comes from a very respectable family with a long history in law.
Employees must show respect for company property.
The CEO was treated with respect by all the staff members.
Please keep a duplicate of this key for emergencies.
The original painting is displayed in the national museum.
All contracts must be signed in duplicate.
I need to make duplicates of these documents for the meeting.

day 4.meaning: sự trái ngược, điều ngược lại
day 4.example: Despite rumors to the contrary, the factory will not close.

day 4.meaning: bằng chứng chứng minh điều ngược lại
day 4.example: We will assume he is innocent until there is evidence to the contrary.
I'm not tired; on the contrary, I have plenty of energy.

day 4.meaning: làm nhiễu loạn, làm xáo trộn
day 4.example: The report revealed some disturbing statistics about unemployment.
Please do not disturb him while he is in a meeting.
The construction noise caused a major disturbance in the neighborhood.

day 4.meaning: tham gia, cam kết, thu hút
day 4.example: We need to engage more young people in our marketing campaigns.

day 4.meaning: sự hứa hẹn, sự cam kế
day 4.example: He had a prior engagement and could not attend the dinner.
The speaker gave an engaging presentation that captivated the audience.
Employees are forbidden to engage in any illegal activities.
The company is currently engaged in a legal dispute with a supplier.

day 4.meaning: thúc đẩy, bồi dưỡng, bồi đắp ( mang nghĩa phát triển về quan hệ hay sự kiện)
day 4.example: The manager wants to foster a collaborative work environment.

day 4.meaning: mở rộng (mang nghĩa phát triển một sự vật lớn hơn)
day 4.example: We plan to enlarge our retail space to display more products.

day 4.meaning: tính chất trung lập, thái độ trung lập
day 4.example: The mediator maintained strict neutrality throughout the negotiations.

day 4.meaning: trung lập / nước trung lập, người trung lập
day 4.example: Journalists should try to be neutral and objective when reporting the news.
The referee must judge the competition neutrally and fairly.
His books are widely read across the globe.
The new highway has very wide lanes.
Please measure the length and width of the room.
The city plans to widen the road to reduce traffic congestion.
The widening of the bridge will take six months to complete.
The new smartphone will be widely advertised on television and social media.
The CEO is widely admired for her philanthropic efforts.

day 4.meaning: một loạt, rộng lớn, đa dang
day 4.example: The store offers a wide range of electronic devices.
